label: Vector Store
description: Upsert or delete vectors in a Milvus collection via the platform's /api/v1/vector/store endpoint. Falls back to /api/files/embed when the primary endpoint fails.

settings.name: metadata
settings.label: Metadata
settings.description: Free-form metadata attached to all stored items. Takes precedence over input.metadata.

ai.shortDescription: Write vectors to a Milvus collection.
ai.whenToUse: After the embedding node — persist vectors so the rag_query node can later search them.
ai.examplePrompt: store the embeddings in the 'support-docs' collection, creating it if missing
ai.promptHints: Input must include { vectors, texts } (typically from the embedding node). Reference stored count via {{steps.<id>.result.stored}}.
